content:
### Task 6: Update init_flags default and post-create help text

### Task 7: Manual smoke test

**Step 1: Run status to verify CUDA shows up**

Run: `cd /root/corvia-project/corvia-workspace && .devcontainer/scripts/corvia-workspace.sh status`
Expected: output includes `cuda` row with `enabled=disabled` and `gpu=not detected` (or GPU info if a GPU is present)

**Step 2: Verify enable/disable error handling (no GPU environment)**

Run: `cd /root/corvia-project/corvia-workspace && .devcontainer/scripts/corvia-workspace.sh enable cuda 2>&1; echo "exit: $?"`
Expected: error message about no NVIDIA GPU detected, exit code 1

**Step 3: Verify disable is safe when never enabled**

Run: `cd /root/corvia-project/corvia-workspace && .devcontainer/scripts/corvia-workspace.sh disable cuda`
Expected: warning about CPU binary backup not found, flag set to disabled

**Step 4: Verify help text**

Run: `cd /root/corvia-project/corvia-workspace && .devcontainer/scripts/corvia-workspace.sh`
Expected: usage text shows `{ollama|surrealdb|cuda}`
